description: Straightforward dorms and private rooms, plus a shared kitchen, a cosy lounge and a grocery shop.
address: Glenbrittle, Carbost, Isle of Skye IV47 8TA, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Set in rugged countryside near the Cuillin Ridge, this modern hostel is 0.6 miles from Sgùrr Dearg mountain and 3 miles from the Fairy Pools.
 Accommodation includes basic dorms and private rooms. Some have bunk beds.
 Amenities include a shared kitchen and a dining room, plus a drying room and a cosy lounge with sofas, books and games. There's also an on-site grocery store.
